title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER D — Papa+Sara+Eva Can't Catch Us! playground tag with slide gag
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song 'Cant Catch Us.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block. Loop choreography is rhythmic playground tag with a slide-gag punchline.
prompt: Wide cinematic shot at @beach-playground — wooden beach playground with a red curly tube-slide on the LEFT, a blue climbing tower with rope ladder in the CENTER-BACK, two swings on the RIGHT, sandy ground with a few palm trees, ocean visible faintly in the background. Bright sunny daylight. The shot is designed as a LOOP-CLEAN tag-game music video. @Papa already on the LEFT side of the frame at the bottom of the curly slide, arms outstretched in a playful tickle-monster pose, big silly comic grin. @Sara already on the climbing tower in the CENTER-BACK halfway up the rope ladder, mid-climb, ponytail flying, looking back over her shoulder laughing. @Eva already on the RIGHT side of the frame on a swing seat mid-air at the top of her arc, both hands gripping the swing chains, curly blonde with rainbow bow flying. STRICT 3-FOREGROUND-CHAR composition, no fourth person anywhere. The 3 figures are spread across the wide composition with the playground equipment between them — playing the tickle-monster game around the playground. Choreographed loop: Papa lunges to one side and reaches up toward Sara, Sara hops to a higher rung and shakes her head playfully, Eva swings forward and back chanting silently, then Papa attempts to climb into the curly tube-slide opening — but he is COMICALLY TOO BIG, his shoulders get wedged in the entrance with his big-eyes 'oh no' face, both legs sticking out, he wiggles dramatically. Sara and Eva burst into silent laughter pointing at stuck-Papa. Papa pops out of the slide with comic motion. All three return to their starting positions ready to loop again. Movements are RHYTHMIC and LOOPABLE — clean cycle: lunge → hop → swing → slide-stuck → laughter → reset. Camera locked at wide angle, head-on, kid-eye-level. Bright cheerful playground lighting. The three hum and sing along generically — no specific dialogue, no lip-sync to any words. The shot is designed to LOOP cleanly. No audible speech, no music — silent render.
